zh.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont是Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester和Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil的女兒，於1125年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。她於1155年之後與Ralph de Tosny在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年之後在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利，埋葬在英國奧可福爾奧可福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont是Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester和Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil的女儿，于1125年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。她于1155年之后与Ralph de Tosny在英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年之后在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利，埋葬在英国奧可福爾奧可福德。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont was born in 1125, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England as the daughter of Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester and Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. She married Ralph de Tosny after 1155, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1185, in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, and was buried in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont est née en 1125, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, fille de Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester et Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Elle a épousé Ralph de Tosny après 1155, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1185, à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont wurde 1125 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, als Tochter von Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester und Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil geboren. Sie hat nach 1155 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England Ralph de Tosny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1185 in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont è nata il nel 1125 nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England come figlia di Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester e Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Lei sposato Ralph de Tosny dopo il 1155, nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1185, nel Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, e fu sepolta a Oxford, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumontは1125年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターでRobert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of LeicesterとAmice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuilの娘として生まれた。1155年以後にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドでRalph de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年以後にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーで死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont(은)는 1125년 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester(와)과 Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1155년 이후 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 Ralph de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 이후 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에서 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont nasceu em 1125, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra filha de Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester e Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Tosny após 1155, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1185, em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont родилась в 1125 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester и Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Tosny после 1155 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1185 г. в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия и была похоронена в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Marguerite Beaumont nació en 1125, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra como hija de Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester y Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Se casó con Ralph de Tosny después de 1155, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1185, en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
